---
title: "Kennedy Gitau"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gitaukennedy

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3
---

## Actuarial Data Scientist | Technical Risk Analyst

I am an Actuarial Analyst and Data Scientist specializing in the design, building, and deployment of end-to-end machine learning engines and interactive data applications. My expertise lies at the intersection of rigorous mathematical risk modeling, statistical learning, and robust backend engineering.

---
---

## Core Production Engines

### 🚀 Insurtech & Risk Analytics Platform
An integrated insurance technology system engineered using FastAPI and Streamlit to deploy specialized actuarial models and deliver real-time risk assessments. 
* **Live Application:** [View Live App](https://your-render-link.com) | [View Code Documentation](projects/insurtech.qmd)

### 🌾 Crop Insurance Claim Risk Engine
An exploratory data analysis and predictive modeling framework designed to identify, analyze, and classify insurance claim risks for smallholder farmers.
* **Documentation & Insights:** [Read Full Project Write-up](projects/crop-insurance.qmd)

### 🧠 Sauti Ya Mwananchi
A full-stack, AI-driven analysis engine architected to parse, deconstruct, and analyze complex regulatory texts, such as national Finance Bills.
* **Project Deep Dive:** [Read Technical Methodology](projects/sauti-ya-mwananchi.qmd)

### 📊 Health Risk Prediction System
An end-to-end machine learning application built using a RandomForestClassifier to estimate and predict diabetes risks based on key clinical health metrics like glucose levels and BMI.
* **Live Application:** [View Live Predictor](https://your-streamlit-link.com) | [View Code](projects/health-predictor.qmd)

---

## Professional Qualifications
* **Accreditation:** Institute and Faculty of Actuaries (IFOA) — Papers CS1 & CM1 in progress.
* **Education:** Bachelor's Degree.
